Box #14—Change the Shape
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #7—Box #14 Change the Shape
*Would it help to make something that is straight curved instead?
Or to make something that is curved straight?
Does someone or something need to be straightened out? Is the best way to get from where
you are and where you want to be a straight line, or more roundabout, more indirect? Writing
often benefits from being more straightforward, more straight to the point. At other times, though,
being less direct may work better.
*Would it help to make something that is now balanced unbalanced?
Or something that is unbalanced balanced?
The word balance has many meanings. Be sure to explore as many of them as you can.
How do you bring more balance to a situation? To writing? To a design? How might it help to
make writing, a design, a situation, or the way resources are distributed less balanced?
.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
